description: With a supportive Fit and crafted from 77% cotton, 22% nylon and 1% spandex, these unisex socks for kids from nike make for a great buy. With the nike swoosh in red, the number 07 in black and the elasticated, ribbed cuff, what better way to enhance your comfort level three-fold than with this stylish pair of socks in white! Made from a cotton/nylon/spandex blend for a secure, enhanced grip and exemplary comfort Moisture wicking to keep feet dry and comfy Arch support for a customised fit Half-cushion terry foot for shock-absorption Breathable sole with softly elasticated broad ribbed cuff to ensure a soft grip Brand swoosh printed on the ribbed cuff Sock care Machine wash in cold water below 30 degrees using a mild detergent Use a non chlorine bleach if needed Tumble dry low Do not iron or dry clean
